name: 02_xauusd_m5_asia_london_breakout_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the Asia-session (00:00-06:00 UTC) high/low range acts as accumulation; a London-session (07:00-10:00 UTC) ATR-normalized breakout with body confirmation captures directional expansion more often than it fails, yielding PF>=2.0.

regime_filter.description: Only trade when market shows at least mild trendiness and non-dead volatility.

signals.entry_long: Price closes >= AsiaHigh + 0.5*ATR(14) AND candle body >= 1.2*ATR(14) during London window, within first 9 bars of window, and AsiaRange between 0.5*ATR and 2.0*ATR
signals.entry_short: Mirror: Price closes <= AsiaLow - 0.5*ATR(14) with body >= 1.2*ATR(14) in London window under same range filter

exits.stop_loss: 1.5 * ATR(14) from entry, or opposite side of Asia range (whichever is tighter but >= broker stops_level)
exits.breakeven_trigger: Move SL to entry after +1.0*ATR favorable
exits.trailing: ATR-chandelier: 2.0*ATR from highest high (long) / lowest low (short) once in profit >1.5*ATR
